thought.text: It seems there was an issue with the connection. Let me try a different approach to get the README file from the repository.

action.thought: I need to find a way to access the README.md file in the openGauss project. Since I can't directly download it, let's explore if we have any local copies of the repository or if there are other ways to access the content.
